languages.original_text: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

languages.text: "Твой разум жаждет познаний, а в словах нет ненависти, присущей собратьям. Это... необычно. Твое неравнодушие однажды обернется пожаром, что спалит тебя дотла, железный мудрец".

"Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."
languages.original_text: "Твой разум жаждет познаний, а в словах нет ненависти, присущей собратьям. Это... необычно. Твое неравнодушие однажды обернется пожаром, что спалит тебя дотла, железный мудрец".

"Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

"Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

languages.text: «Tu mente ansía conocimiento y tus palabras carecen del odio innato de tus camaradas. Es... sorprendente. Tu falta de desapego se convertirá un día en un fuego que te reducirá a cenizas, sabio de metal».
languages.original_text: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

traits.locale_text: «Tu mente ansía conocimiento y tus palabras carecen del odio innato de tus camaradas. Es... sorprendente. Tu falta de desapego se convertirá un día en un fuego que te reducirá a cenizas, sabio de metal».

languages.text: 「お前の精神は知識に渇いており、その言葉には、同胞に染みついた憎しみが欠けている。それは……尋常ではない。お前が距離を置けぬその性分は、いつの日かお前を地に焼き尽くす炎へと変わるだろう、鉄の賢者よ」
languages.original_text: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

traits.locale_text: 「お前の精神は知識に渇いており、その言葉には、同胞に染みついた憎しみが欠けている。それは……尋常ではない。お前が距離を置けぬその性分は、いつの日かお前を地に焼き尽くす炎へと変わるだろう、鉄の賢者よ」

languages.text: “你的心智渴求知识，你的言辞中也没有你同类固有的那种仇恨。这一点……非同寻常。你的执念，终有一日会化作烈焰将你烧成灰烬，钢铁贤者。”
languages.original_text: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

traits.locale_text: “你的心智渴求知识，你的言辞中也没有你同类固有的那种仇恨。这一点……非同寻常。你的执念，终有一日会化作烈焰将你烧成灰烬，钢铁贤者。”

languages.text: "Euer Verstand dürstet nach Wissen und Euren Worten fehlt der Hass Eurer Artgenossen. Das ist ... ungewöhnlich. Eure fehlende Distanz wird sich eines Tages in ein Feuer verwandeln, das Euch verbrennt, Eisenweiser."
languages.original_text: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Verstand dürstet nach Wissen und Euren Worten fehlt der Hass Eurer Artgenossen. Das ist ... ungewöhnlich. Eure fehlende Distanz wird sich eines Tages in ein Feuer verwandeln, das Euch verbrennt, Eisenweiser."

languages.text: « Votre esprit a soif de connaissances, et vos paroles sont dépourvues de la haine que me vouent vos congénères. Voilà qui est... inhabituel. Votre passion se transformera un jour en un brasier qui vous consumera jusqu'à l'os, sage de fer. »
languages.original_text: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."

traits.locale_text: « Votre esprit a soif de connaissances, et vos paroles sont dépourvues de la haine que me vouent vos congénères. Voilà qui est... inhabituel. Votre passion se transformera un jour en un brasier qui vous consumera jusqu'à l'os, sage de fer. »

languages.text: "Zihnin bilgiye susamış ve sözlerinde yoldaşlarında olan o nefret yok. Bu... Alışılmadık bir durum. Kopukluğunun eksikliği bir gün seni küle çevirecek bir ateşe dönüşecek demir âlim."
languages.original_text: "Your mind thirsts for knowledge, and your words lack the hatred inherent in your fellows. It is... unusual. Your lack of detachment will one day turn into a fire that will burn you to the ground, iron sage."
